name: Parsnip Puree with Grand Marnier
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel parsnips and cut into 1/2-inch slices.
2. Place the parsnip slices in a medium-size saucepan.
3. Cover with water, add a pinch of salt, and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to medium and cook for about 35 minutes or until the parsnips are very tender when pierced with a sharp knife.
5. Drain thoroughly.
6. Puree the parsnips in a food processor or through a food mill until very smooth.
7. (Optional) Refrigerate the puree and reheat about 30 minutes before serving.
8. Just before serving, add warm cream and butter, one tablespoon at a time.
9. Beat well.
10. Add Grand Marnier to taste and season with salt and freshly ground white pepper.
11. Sprinkle parsley over the top.
